summonSignReloadSignIntervalTime1.AltName: Summoning sign reacquisition waiting time (in depopulated conditions) [seconds]

summonSignReloadSignTotalCount.AltName: Maximum number of summoning signs that can be possessed (overall)

summonSignReloadSignCellCount.AltName: Maximum number of summoning signs that can be possessed (cell)

summonSignBasicExclusiveRange.AltName: Exclusive horizontal range drawn between summoning signs [m]

summonSignBasicExclusiveHeight.AltName: Exclusive vertical range drawn between summoning signs [m]

previewChrWaitingTime.AltName: Summon sign character model drawing waiting time [seconds]

summonSignVisibleRange.AltName: Summoning sign drawing distance between PCs [m]

minWhitePhantomLimitTimeScale.AltName: White spirit sign display time limit lower limit magnification

minSmallPhantomLimitTimeScale.AltName: Small spirit sign display time limit lower limit magnification

whiteKeywordLimitTimeScale.AltName: White Spirit Sign Keyword Extension Multiplier

smallKeywordLimitTimeScale.AltName: Small spirit sign keyword extension magnification

blackKeywordLimitTimeScale.AltName: Dark Spirit Sign Keyword Extension Multiplier

dragonKeywordLimitTimeScale.AltName: Dragon Spirit Sign Keyword Extension Multiplier

bloodMessageReloadNewSignCellCount.AltName: Number of blood letters obtained (cell, newest order)

bloodMessageReloadRandomSignCellCount.AltName: Number of blood letters obtained (cell, random)

bloodMessageMaxSignTotalCount.AltName: Upper limit on the number of blood letters that can be possessed (overall)

bloodMessageMaxSignCellCount.AltName: Maximum number of blood letters that can be possessed (cell)

bloodMessageBasicExclusiveRange.AltName: Blood character drawing exclusive horizontal range [m]

bloodMessageBasicExclusiveHeight.AltName: Exclusive vertical range drawn between bloody characters [m]

bloodMessageMaxWriteSignCount.AltName: Upper limit on the number of written blood letters history

bloodMessageMaxReadSignCount.AltName: Maximum number of blood letters read history

bloodMessageLifeTime.AltName: Blood letter data retention period upper limit [seconds]

areaBloodMessageReloadSignIntervalTime.AltName: Area blood message reload time interval [sec]

bloodstainKeyGuideRangePlayer.AltName: Player bloodstain key guide horizontal range [m]

bloodstainKeyGuideHeightPlayer.AltName: Player bloodstain key guide vertical range [m]

bloodstainMaxSignTotalCount.AltName: Maximum number of bloodstains that can be possessed (overall)

bloodstainMaxSignCellCount.AltName: Maximum number of bloodstains that can be possessed (cell)

bloodstainBasicExclusiveRange.AltName: Exclusive horizontal range of drawing between bloodstains [m]

bloodstainBasicExclusiveHeight.AltName: Exclusive vertical range drawn between bloodstains [m]

bloodstainLifeTime.AltName: Bloodstain data retention period upper limit [seconds]

maxGhostTotalCount.AltName: Maximum number of illusions that can be possessed (overall)

distanceOfBeginRecordVersus.AltName: Hostile PC replay recording start distance [m]

distanceOfEndRecordVersus.AltName: Hostile PC replay recording end distance [m]

replayGhostRangeOnView.AltName: Phantom playback distance (within field of view) [sec]

replayGhostRangeOutView.AltName: Phantom playback distance (outside field of view) [sec]

replayBonfireModeRange.AltName: Phantom bonfire mode regeneration applicable distance

stopBonfireModeRangeOnView.AltName: Phantom bonfire mode stopping distance (within field of view) [seconds]

stopBonfireModeRangeOutView.AltName: Phantom bonfire mode stopping distance (outside field of view) [seconds]

maxCoopBlueSummonCount.AltName: Maximum number of rescue blue spirits appearing

maxBellGuardSummonCount.AltName: Upper limit on the number of Bell Keeper Ash Ghost appearances

maxVisitListCount.AltName: Number of ring search destinations obtained

reloadSearch_CoopBlue_Min.AltName: Rescue blue spirit reload time minimum [sec]

reloadSearch_CoopBlue_Max.AltName: Rescue blue spirit reload time maximum [sec]

darkPhantomLimitBoostTime.AltName: Dark spirit limit time acceleration time [seconds]

darkPhantomLimitBoostScale.AltName: Dark spirit limit time acceleration multiplier

phantomWarpMinimumTime.AltName: Minimum time until the spirit warps [seconds]

phantomReturnDelayTime.AltName: Delay time until returning after using black crystal [seconds]

terminateTimeoutTime.AltName: Timeout time for waiting for disconnection

penaltyPointLanDisconnect.AltName: Additional penalty due to LAN disconnection

penaltyPointReboot.AltName: Additional penalty due to power outage

penaltyPointBeginPenalize.AltName: Penalty value at which the penalty is triggered

allAreaSearchRate_VsBlue.AltName: Area search rate: Retribution Blue Spirit [0-100]

allAreaSearchRate_BellGuard.AltName: All-area search rate: Bell Keeper Ashei [0-100]

bloodMessageEvalHealRate.AltName: HP recovery rate during blood letter evaluation [0-100]

smallGoldSuccessHostRewardId.AltName: Small gold spirit successful return host reward ID

doorInvalidPlayAreaExtents.AltName: Disable play area near door distance [m]

signDisplayMax.AltName: Maximum number of signs displayed simultaneously

bloodStainDisplayMax.AltName: Maximum number of bloodstains displayed simultaneously

bloodMessageDisplayMax.AltName: Maximum number of blood characters displayed simultaneously

reloadMKSignIntervalTime2.AltName: Mirror Knight Sign reacquisition waiting time [seconds]

reloadMKSignTotalCount.AltName: Maximum number of mirror knight signatures that can be possessed
